title: Clever LMS Connect - LTI 1.3 SSO
heading: Clever LMS Connect - LTI 1.3 SSO
content:

> ❗️
> 
> ### 
> 
> Clever Complete Agreement Required
> 
> [](#clever-complete-agreement-required)
> 
> This feature is included with a Clever Complete subscription. Sign up [here](https://www.clever.com/developer-signup) or email your Application Success Manager to learn more.

> 🚧
> 
> ### 
> 
> v3.1 Only
> 
> [](#v31-only)
> 
> LMS Connect API endpoints are only available on v3.1 of the Clever API. If you are interested in getting started with LMS Connect, reach out to your Application Success Manager (for existing partners) or to [\[email protected\]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#7f1e0f0f13161c1e0b1610115216110b1a0d1a0c0b3f1c131a091a0d511c1012).

> ❗️
> 
> ### 
> 
> This product is only available to existing Secure Sync partners.
> 
> [](#this-product-is-only-available-to-existing-secure-sync-partners)
> 
> To learn more about Secure Sync, please review [this documentation](https://dev.clever.com/docs/district-getting-started).

# 

Overview

[](#overview)

As part of the LMS Connect offering, your application can be integrated into a district's LMS as an LTI 1.3-compliant SSO link. To get started, simply ensure you have a functioning [Clever District SSO](https://dev.clever.com/docs/district-sso) integration—we'll handle the rest!

To learn more about how districts can set up LTI SSO with your application in their LMS, check out this [Help Center article.](https://support.clever.com/hc/s/articles/000001647?language=en_US)

> ☝️
> 
> ### 
> 
> Supported LMSs
> 
> [](#supported-lmss)
> 
> Please note that LTI 1.3 SSO is currently only supported for **Canvas** and **Schoology**.
